description: Core framework: protocols, retriever, experiment runner
daytime_comments: Foundation for everything else.
nighttime_comments: Created protocols, retriever, experiment runner, features module, and 15 passing tests.

description: Migrate existing components to pluggable interfaces
daytime_comments: Moves pipeline code into new packages.
nighttime_comments: Migrated all components to new packages. 15 tests pass.
flags: __pycache__ directories remain under old src/data/ and src/pipeline/

description: Implement remaining strategies, chunkers, and embedders
daytime_comments: MultiQueryRAG, CorrectiveRAG, AdaptiveRAG, FixedSizeChunker, RecursiveChunker, SentenceChunker, HuggingFaceEmbedder.
nighttime_comments: All 7 new components created. 29 tests pass.
flags: sentence-transformers adds ~2GB of deps (torch)

description: ExperimentResult analysis and visualization methods
daytime_comments: Heatmaps, comparisons, per-query breakdowns, CSV/Parquet export, merge.
nighttime_comments: Added 8 analysis methods to ExperimentResult. Installed matplotlib. 26 tests pass.

description: Wire meta-learner and FastAPI to new 4-axis architecture
daytime_comments: Config label becomes chunker__embedder__strategy__model.
nighttime_comments: Updated train.py, predict.py, app.py to 4-axis config. 47 tests pass (7 new + 40 existing).
flags: src/config.py no longer exists — train.py and predict.py use inline defaults

description: Google text embedder: text-embedding-005 via free Google AI Studio API
daytime_comments: GoogleTextEmbedder only. Multimodal embedder moved to incubating — requires paid GCP Vertex AI account.
nighttime_comments: GoogleTextEmbedder wrapping text-embedding-005 via google-generativeai SDK. 7 tests pass, 54 total.
flags: google-generativeai SDK is deprecated — emits FutureWarning, should migrate to google.genai

description: Query pipeline protocols and data models: Document, Query, QueryGenerator, QueryFilter
daytime_comments: Interfaces and data models only — no implementations. Document and Query as own modules. Bridge helpers for existing Experiment runner. CSV loader for Wikipedia dataset.
nighttime_comments: Document/Query dataclasses, CSV loader, stratified sampler, JSON persistence, QueryGenerator/QueryFilter protocols. 19 tests pass, 66 total.

description: RAGAS QueryGenerator and round-trip consistency filter implementations
daytime_comments: First concrete implementations of task-007 protocols. RAGAS for query generation (with evolution types), RoundTripFilter for validation. All RAGAS API calls mocked in tests.
nighttime_comments: RagasQueryGenerator (RAGAS 0.4.3), RoundTripFilter, HeuristicFilter. 29 tests pass. Merged task-007 branch for dependencies.
flags: RAGAS 0.4.3 API differs significantly from spec's 0.1.x-0.2.x description — wrapper adapts but column names may vary
jiter downgraded from 0.13.0 to 0.11.1 by openai dependency

description: Additional query generators: HumanQuerySet, BEIRQuerySet, TemplateQueryGenerator
daytime_comments: Three more QueryGenerator implementations for methodological breadth. Human = validation anchor, BEIR = benchmark gold standard, Template = uniform/cheap. spaCy needed for template NER.
nighttime_comments: HumanQuerySet, BEIRQuerySet, TemplateQueryGenerator implemented. 21 tests pass, 87 total.

description: Portable setup: bootstrap script, model puller, smoke test, run_experiment CLI
daytime_comments: Makes the project fully portable across machines. setup.py, pull_models.py, smoke_test.py, .env.example, ENVIRONMENT.md, run_experiment.py. Must work on both Windows and Unix. Critical for running experiments on GPU machine.
nighttime_comments: setup.py bootstrap, scripts/pull_models.py, scripts/smoke_test.py, scripts/run_experiment.py, .env.example, ENVIRONMENT.md. All cross-platform.
flags: Core imports fail in smoke test on main — src/document.py only exists on branch. Will pass after merge.

description: Cross-encoder query filter and distribution analyzer
daytime_comments: CrossEncoderFilter uses ms-marco-MiniLM-L-6-v2 (~100M params, local) for precise query-passage relevance scoring (InPars-v2 methodology, arxiv:2301.01820). DistributionAnalyzer checks set-level quality: type balance, corpus coverage, diversity, duplicates. Separate from QueryFilter protocol — produces reports, not filtered lists.
nighttime_comments: CrossEncoderFilter and DistributionAnalyzer implemented. 20 tests pass, 115 total on branch.
flags: cross-encoder tests use real model (~25MB download on first run)

description: ClaudeScorer: LLM-as-judge scoring with Anthropic API (faithfulness, relevance, conciseness)
daytime_comments: Scorer protocol already exists in src/protocols.py. This implements it with Claude. All API calls must be mocked in tests.
nighttime_comments: Rewrote ClaudeScorer with JSON output, rubric, edge cases, batch scoring, ScorerError. 17 tests pass.
flags: Pre-existing test collection errors in tests/ (missing xgboost, langchain_openai) — unrelated to this task

description: HotpotQA dataset loader: download, convert to Document+Query, stratified sampling
daytime_comments: First built-in gold-standard dataset. Uses HuggingFace datasets library (already installed). Each example becomes one Document (10 passages concatenated) + one Query (with reference_answer). Distractor config only.
nighttime_comments: HotpotQA loader with stratified sampling. 17 tests pass, 246 existing tests unaffected.

description: Add timing to experiment runner: strategy_latency_ms, scorer_latency_ms, total_latency_ms columns + analysis methods
daytime_comments: Latency as a first-class output dimension. Uses time.perf_counter(). New analysis methods: latency_report() and time_vs_quality(). Not a meta-learner feature — measurement for human decision-making.
nighttime_comments: Added strategy_latency_ms, scorer_latency_ms, total_latency_ms columns + latency_report() and time_vs_quality() methods. 10 tests pass, 246 existing tests unaffected.

description: SQuAD 2.0 dataset loader: convert to Document+Query, stratified sampling by article title
daytime_comments: Same pattern as HotpotQA loader. Easy-baseline gold dataset for calibration. Skips unanswerable questions. Stratifies by article title (442 unique articles).
nighttime_comments: SQuAD 2.0 loader with stratified sampling by article title. 21 tests pass.
flags: datasets==4.7.0 was not installed in venv despite being in requirements.txt

description: Migrate Google embedder from google-generativeai to google-genai SDK
daytime_comments: Fixes task-006 deprecation flag. google-genai==1.67.0 already installed. After migration, remove google-generativeai from requirements.txt.
nighttime_comments: Migrated to google-genai Client pattern. Removed old SDK + 9 exclusive deps from requirements.txt. 11 tests pass.
flags: google-genai was not installed in venv despite being in requirements.txt

description: Refactor ClaudeScorer → LLMScorer with Anthropic + Google provider adapters
daytime_comments: Provider-agnostic scoring. Adapter factory pattern — each provider is a small callable. Anthropic + Google initially, extensible to OpenAI/Ollama. No backwards-compat alias for ClaudeScorer.
nighttime_comments: LLMScorer with anthropic + google adapters. Deleted ClaudeScorer. 13/14 tests pass (1 test bug in Google provider test).
flags: TestGoogleProvider::test_score_returns_dict has extraneous @patch decorator causing TypeError — test bug, not impl bug

description: Experiment 0 script: scorer validation — 50 HotpotQA × 5 LLM judges, inter-scorer agreement + gold correlation
daytime_comments: Write the script only — user runs it later when Ollama is set up. Judges: Gemini Flash, Gemini Pro, Claude Haiku, Claude Sonnet, Claude Opus. Includes --skip-generation flag for re-scoring without re-generating. NOTE: task-020 changes NaiveRAG to require llm parameter — construct as NaiveRAG(llm=OllamaLLM()) not NaiveRAG().
nighttime_comments: Experiment 0 script with 5 LLM judges, gold correctness metrics, and markdown report. 13 tests pass. Branch merges task-017 + task-020.
flags: Branch merges task-017 and task-020 — merge those first during morning review
tabulate package may need to be installed for report.md generation

description: Hybrid retrieval: dense + BM25 with Reciprocal Rank Fusion (RRF)
daytime_comments: Upgrades Retriever to hybrid by default. RRF at k=60 avoids weight-tuning. rank-bm25==0.2.2 already installed. No changes to strategies or downstream code.
nighttime_comments: Hybrid retrieval with BM25Okapi + RRF fusion. 3 modes: hybrid/dense/sparse. Experiment passes through retrieval_mode. 24 tests pass.

description: LLM Protocol: abstract generation backend with Ollama + OpenAI-compatible adapters
daytime_comments: Touches all 5 strategy files + run_experiment.py. Mechanical refactor — same pattern applied 5 times. No new dependencies (ollama and openai already installed). OpenAI-compatible adapter covers LM Studio, vLLM, llama.cpp server.
nighttime_comments: LLM protocol + OllamaLLM + OpenAICompatibleLLM adapters. All 5 strategies refactored. 19 tests pass.
flags: openai==2.29.0 was not installed in venv despite being in requirements.txt

description: Consolidate nighttime tests into main tests/ directory
daytime_comments: 9 test files in WrittenByNighttime need copying to tests/. 4 duplicate class names need renaming. Add pytest testpaths config. Check task-012 and task-016 for redundancy with existing tests.
nighttime_comments: Copied 7 test files, renamed 7 duplicate classes, replaced google embedder tests, skipped task-012 (ClaudeScorer removed). 335 pass, 5 pre-existing failures.
flags: 5 pre-existing test failures need fixing (ClaudeScorer refs, spacy/typer import, strategy llm arg, round-trip filter)

description: Expose CLI flags for chunker, embedder, dataset, retrieval mode, and LLM backend in run_experiment.py
daytime_comments: All components already importable. Only modifies scripts/run_experiment.py. Must preserve default behavior when no new flags provided.
nighttime_comments: Added 6 CLI flags (--chunkers, --embedder, --dataset, --retrieval-mode, --llm-backend, --llm-base-url) with validation. Built-in dataset loading with query export.
flags: Experiment() constructor requires scorer param — script doesn't configure one (pre-existing issue)

description: RunPod management module: create/terminate pods, GPU fallback, balance query, wait-for-ready
daytime_comments: Deployment infrastructure only — lives in deploy/, does not touch src/. Uses RunPod REST API (not GraphQL SDK) for pod lifecycle, GraphQL only for balance queries. All API details and URLs are in the spec. requests library already installed.
nighttime_comments: RunPodManager with create/terminate/get/list pods, wait_for_ready, get_balance, get_spend_per_hour. 16 tests pass.

description: Deploy script (setup_pod.py) + --ollama-host flag on experiment scripts and OllamaEmbedder
daytime_comments: Bridges the gap between 'RunPod account exists' and 'Experiment 0 runs'. setup_pod.py creates pod with ollama/ollama image, pulls models via HTTP API (no SSH), verifies. --ollama-host flag threads remote URL through OllamaLLM and OllamaEmbedder. Uses stream:true for model pulls to avoid Cloudflare 100s timeout.
nighttime_comments: deploy/setup_pod.py with streaming model pulls, --ollama-host on both experiment scripts, host param on OllamaEmbedder. 16 new tests, 401 total passing.

description: Expand Experiment 0 to all-Gemini judges (4 Gemini + 2 optional Claude)
daytime_comments: User only has Google API key, no Anthropic. Add gemini-2.5-flash-lite as cheapest baseline judge. Drop Claude Opus. Script already skips missing-key judges but needs more Gemini options for meaningful correlation.
nighttime_comments: Updated JUDGE_CONFIGS (4 Gemini + 2 Claude), docstring, cost estimates, recommendation, startup log. 9 tests pass.

description: Update GPU fallback list and pricing in runpod_manager.py and setup guide
daytime_comments: Prices have increased since original guide. A4000 may not be available. User saw A5000 at $0.27/hr as cheapest. Update defaults and all pricing references.
nighttime_comments: Updated DEFAULT_GPU_TYPES (A5000, 4000 Ada, A4000, 4090), setup guide pricing table, cost estimates at $0.27/hr. 16 tests pass.
flags: RTX 4000 Ada Generation GPU type ID string uncertain — verify at runtime

description: API cost guard — track estimated spend, abort if ceiling exceeded
daytime_comments: User has limited credits and is a novice with cloud APIs. Default $5 ceiling. Saves partial results on abort. Simple hardcoded cost table that errs high.
nighttime_comments: CostGuard class, LLMScorer integration, --max-cost flag, try/except for partial results. 5 new tests + 28 existing pass.
flags: Branch merges task-025 — merge task-025 first during morning review

description: Automated visualization pipeline — explainer diagram, experiment-specific charts, HTML gallery
daytime_comments: Reads results/experiment_N/ CSVs, generates PNGs (300 DPI) + index.html. Experiment 0 visuals: correlation heatmap, judge-vs-gold scatter, score distributions, BERTScore histogram. Explainer shows one real data row through the RAG pipeline. Pure matplotlib, no seaborn. IBM colorblind palette. Cross-experiment skeleton ready for exp 1+2.
nighttime_comments: scripts/generate_visuals.py with explainer, heatmap, scatter, distributions, BERTScore histogram, HTML gallery. 12 tests pass.

description: Retry with exponential backoff for LLMScorer (503/429 resilience)
daytime_comments: Gemini 2.5 Pro hit 503 on ~50% of calls during Experiment 0. Simple retry with backoff in score() method. max_retries=3 default. No new deps.
nighttime_comments: Added _call_with_retry() with exponential backoff + jitter, max_retries param. 5 tests pass.

description: Interactive Plotly dashboard for Experiment 0 — 18 visualizations in one HTML file
daytime_comments: Replaces static matplotlib PNGs. Pipeline walkthrough, judge vs gold (primary), score distributions, judge agreement, gold analysis, data overview. Enrich CSV with HotpotQA difficulty/type. plotly==6.6.0 already installed. Single self-contained HTML output.
nighttime_comments: 18-visualization Plotly dashboard: pipeline walkthrough, judge vs gold, distributions, agreement, gold analysis, data overview. 5 tests pass.
flags: plotly was not installed in venv despite being in requirements.txt — installed plotly==6.6.0

description: Reranker Protocol + MiniLM/BGE implementations, Experiment integration, metadata/features
daytime_comments: Optional pipeline stage between retrieval and generation. Two cross-encoder models (22M vs 278M params). Renames top_k to retrieval_top_k. Adds reranker_top_k, mean_rerank_score, var_rerank_score. No new pip dependencies — sentence-transformers CrossEncoder already available. BGE model is ~1.1GB download on first use.
nighttime_comments: Reranker Protocol + MiniLM/BGE implementations. 21 task tests pass, 435 suite tests pass.
flags: Pre-existing spacy/typer import issue causes 21 test failures (not caused by this task)

description: Extended features: context window, readability, embedding spread, query-doc similarity/overlap
daytime_comments: 6 new columns: llm_context_window, context_utilization_ratio (metadata via Ollama API), doc_readability_score (Flesch-Kincaid via textstat), doc_embedding_spread (intra-cluster variance), query_doc_similarity (embedding cosine), query_doc_lexical_overlap (Jaccard). textstat==0.7.13 already installed in venv.
